articles.title: At least one dead in Texas floods ravaging same area as Camp Mystic
articles.difficulty_reason: Short, direct disaster report with a clear timeline and simple sentences; mostly B1/B2 vocabulary and little background knowledge needed.

articles.title: British Steel taken into public ownership to protect 'vital' UK supply
articles.difficulty_reason: Moderate business and policy report with some economic background; longer sentences and useful B1/B2/C1 vocabulary about industry and government.

articles.title: Zelensky's removal of popular defence minister sparks protests in Ukraine
articles.difficulty_reason: Dense political and military analysis with many quoted sources and background on the war; complex sentences and B2/C1/C2 vocabulary.
